title: Daily Routine: Your Day in Simple Spanish
objectives: Describe a simple daily routine using common verbs, times, and sequence words.
Understand Carlos in short guided exchanges.
Use the lesson language in one realistic conversation.
objective: Describe a simple daily routine using common verbs, times, and sequence words.

grammar.explanation: Use simple present verbs for routine. Add primero, despu?s, and luego to make your day sound organized.

examples.spanish: Primero, me levanto a las siete.
examples.english: First, I get up at seven.
Afterward, I eat breakfast with coffee.

grammar.practicePrompt: Say one original sentence using today?s pattern with Carlos.

lines.speaker: Carlos

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.english: How do you say it with your family?

lines.spanish: Lo digo despacio y con respeto.
lines.english: I say it slowly and respectfully.

culture.title: Daily Routine in Real Life
culture.text: Daily routines vary by country and family. In some places lunch is longer, dinner is later, and family time is built into the day.

cultureNotes: Daily routines vary by country and family. In some places lunch is longer, dinner is later, and family time is built into the day.

nativeSpeech.title: How Carlos would say it naturally
notes: ??Qu? haces en la ma?ana?? is a natural routine question.
?Normalmente? is a useful word for describing what you usually do.

commonMistakes.mistake: Translating I shower as ducho only

commonMistakes.correction: Por la ma?ana is widely understood.
commonMistakes.explanation: Both exist, but por la ma?ana is very common.
Sequence words make your Spanish clearer.

realLifeMission.title: Real Life Mission
realLifeMission.mission: Tell Carlos your daily routine with at least five actions and two time phrases.
successCriteria: Use at least three lesson vocabulary items.
Answer one follow-up question from Carlos.

review.summary: You practiced daily routine for everyday Spanish.
canDo: Answer Carlos with simple complete sentences.
Use the Real Life Mission in a practical situation.
